violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher jug was empty. Corrected.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths on prep tables. Set up sanitizer buckets at each food prep sight.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Raw chicken sitting out to thaw. Needs to be thawed under refrigeration or cold running water.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard on shelves in back prep area must be removed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean front of cooler on cook line.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Do not re-use cardboard boxes for storage of cooked chicken.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need more cleaning.
